message:
fix(clippy): resolve 5 warnings in undo, approval, cleanup, tantivy_ingest

- undo.rs: clone_on_copy UndoOutcome, unnecessary raw string literal hashes
- approval.rs: absurd_extreme_comparisons (i64 <= i64::MAX always true)
- cleanup.rs: needless_collect before is_empty → use any()
- tantivy_ingest.rs: borrowed expression for std::fs::write

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
